programme.title: Gaither Gospel Hour
programme.sub-title: Josh Turner: I Serve a Savior
programme.desc: Josh Turner has just completed an all-new gospel recording; featuring some of his favorite hymns and hits such as "Long Black Train," "Amazing Grace" and more, this gospel debut captures the heart and voice of the faith-filled baritone.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, a Christian minister, discusses religious teachings and encourages people to live ethically.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Seven Churches of Revelation: The Church in Satan's City
programme.desc: A look at the church in Pergamos shows what happens when idolatry and compromise are allowed to seep into a congregation.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Matt Crouch, Laurie Crouch and Joseph Prince clear up some views on healing.

programme.title: Main Stage
programme.desc: The Erwins; the Gold City Reunion and Tribute Quartet; host Jason Crabb and the Isaacs.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Insights -- Israel and the Middle East
programme.desc: Exploring the discoveries that support the Bible and help to understand the past.

programme.title: Signs & Secrets of the Messiah with Rabbi Jason Sobel
programme.sub-title: The Signs and Secrets of Healing (Part 1)
programme.desc: A man laid by the pool of Bethesda for 38 years, waiting for healing; in an instant Yeshua changed the man's entire life; Rabbi Jason explores the significance of where and when this miracle took place, and what that means for lives today.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Featuring the contemporary Christian music and worship, ministry voices, interviews from a wide variety of guests and an hour of relevant talk.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Seven Churches of Revelation: The Adulterous Church
programme.desc: In Thyatira, a good church fell prey to the subtleties of immorality.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, a Christian minister, discusses religious teachings and encourages people to live ethically.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Joseph Prince is a leading voice in proclaiming the gospel around the world through his ministry.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: The teaching ministry of American Southern Baptist pastor and television host, Robert Jeffress; he is a senior minister of the First Baptist Church in Dallas as well as a Fox News contributor.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.sub-title: Jameson Reeder Sr. and Jameson Jr.: Shark Attack
programme.desc: A young boy maimed by a shark tells his story, and his father discusses the emotional impact of the life-threatening trauma.

programme.title: The Supernatural Now
